response.global_summary: The video shows a static image of the VTuber Rindo Chihaya from the group FLOW GLOW, displaying a farewell thank-you message after her birthday live concert, accompanied by background music. No specific song could be identified.

scenes.description: A static screen displaying a thank-you message from Rindo Chihaya after her birthday live event, with background music playing.
